corridor_framing.ge_city_pop_note: OCSTAT 2024 municipal register — matches Geneva JSON
corridor_framing.ls_city_pop_note: Ville de Lausanne 2024 — matches Lausanne JSON
corridor_framing.source: BFS STATPOP 2024, corridor estimate from City101 crossref

grand_geneve.note: Cross-border agglomeration including communes in Ain and Haute-Savoie (France)

lausanne_agglo.note: Largest fully-Swiss agglomeration on the corridor

vaud_canton.note: Approximate; GDP per capita not extracted — data available at BFS

transit_ge_ls.note: Lausanne is busier than Geneva by station traffic — Lausanne is the network hub where lines converge

frontalier_trends.note: Full quarterly timeseries not extracted — partial milestones below

geneva.source: RTS reporting on SEM STAF 2024 record year, Wuest Partner analysis

frontalier_trends.narrative_note: Combined GE+VD frontaliers (~160k) exceed Lausanne municipality population (~145k). Structurally invisible in diversity metrics — vanish from corridor after 18:00.

cost_of_living.note: Numbeo crowd-sourced — use with caution. Mercer ranking is for expat cost of living.

season_tickets.by_canton: NOT AVAILABLE — opendata.swiss dataset exists but per-canton breakdown not extracted
season_tickets.note: Record year for Halbtax. GA dataset available at opendata.swiss for follow-up.

key_contrasts.geneva: International hub — 38 intl orgs, 750+ NGOs, ~36k intl org jobs
key_contrasts.lausanne: Olympic Capital since 1994 (IOC HQ since 1915), sport federation hub

key_contrasts.geneva: Finance, intl orgs, luxury goods, services

key_contrasts.lausanne: UNIL (~16k), EPFL (~13k), ECAL, EHL, IMD — higher density

data_gaps: GDP per capita by canton — BFS table exists but values not extracted from search
GA/Halbtax by canton — opendata.swiss dataset exists, not downloaded
Full quarterly frontalier timeseries 2020-2024 — only milestones available
Route-specific ridership Geneva-Lausanne — only station-level data public

research_metadata.reliability_note: Most figures from official Swiss sources (BFS, SEM, SBB). Cost of living from Numbeo (crowd-sourced). All figures should be verified against primary sources before publication.
